Projects

ReRhythm ↗

Competition Project

AI-powered 28-day career coaching platform — parses resumes with AWS Textract, generates personalised roadmaps via AWS Bedrock (Claude), deploys on ECS Fargate with CloudFormation, DynamoDB, and KMS.

🏆 Second runner-up — AWS Competition, UTA Symposium 2026

Featured Web Project
